title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Managing Oily Hair and Hormonal Imbalances
description: Melaleuca alternifolia essential oils, commonly known as tea tree oil, can be a helpful natural remedy for oily hair. This is because tea tree oil has antimicrobial and antifungal properties, thanks to its main constituents like cineole, terpinen-4-ol, and alpha-pinene. These properties help reduce the growth of bacteria and fungi on the scalp, which can contribute to oily hair and scalp issues like dandruff and itchiness.
